values.content:
=Based on these industry trends: {{ JSON.stringify($input.first().json.trends) }}

Generate 3 social media posts (1 for LinkedIn, 1 for Twitter/X, 1 for Instagram).

Return JSON with:
- linkedin_post (professional tone, 150-200 words, include hashtags)
- twitter_post (short, engaging, max 280 chars, include 3 hashtags)
- instagram_post (casual tone, include emojis, call-to-action, 5-10 hashtags)
- suggested_image_idea (description of image to use)
- best_posting_times (object with best times for each platform)

Return only valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Social Media Posts Approval Required - Week of {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

values.content:
=Analyze this social media performance data:

{{ JSON.stringify($input.first().json) }}

Provide:
- top_performing_post (platform and content snippet)
- lowest_performing_post (platform and content snippet)
- overall_engagement_rate (percentage)
- key_insights (array of 3 insights)
- recommendations (array of 3 actionable recommendations for next week)

Return only valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Weekly Social Media Performance Report - {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
